positive: A minimalist, abstract depiction of a serene landscape, focusing on the silhouette of stylized mountains and a massive, rising sun. The style is inspired by Japanese woodblock prints (Ukiyo-e) meets modern vector art. The color palette is restricted to deep indigo, warm burnt orange, and cream white, utilizing strong negative space. Composition is centered, highly scalable, and designed for maximum impact on clothing. Clean lines, strong graphical contrast, and a harmonious blend of geometric and natural elements. The sun is represented as a perfect, radiating circle.
negative: blur, noise, grain, text, logo, watermark, signature, artifact, extra limbs, bad anatomy, messy, cluttered, low detail, photo, photograph, realistic photo, gradients (except for intended color wash)
